proposals.reasoning: The header 'Research' is a single word appearing after the course number and before other standard sections. It is likely a descriptor or part of the course title rather than a distinct section header, and should be demoted to body text. The section 'Required Late Work Policy' explicitly references 'Student Rule 7' in its content, indicating it is a university-wide institutional policy rather than a course-specific policy. Therefore, if this section appears verbatim across all syllabi, its header and content should be stripped as boilerplate.
